description: A user reports they are unable to get the presentation to show on the main screen in a conference room.

nodes.task_description: Ask the user to verify all cables are securely plugged in and the projector/TV is on the correct input source.

expected_outcome.value: The user confirms all basic connections are correct.

nodes.task_description: Guide the user to check their laptop's display settings (e.g., press Windows Key + P) and select 'Duplicate' or 'Extend'.

expected_outcome.value: This action resolves the issue, and the presentation appears on the screen.
